use sqlx::PgPool;
use std::collections::HashMap;

async fn fetch_user_map(pool: &PgPool, user_ids: &[i64]) -> Result<HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>, sqlx::Error> {
    let rows = sqlx::query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ANY($1)")
        .bind(user_ids)
        .fetch_all(pool)
        .await?;

    let mut map = HashMap::new();
    // BAD: decoding each row into untyped HashMap<String, Value>
    for row in rows {
        let mut entry = HashMap::new();
        for col in row.columns() {
            let val: serde_json::Value = row.try_get(col.name())?;
            entry.insert(col.name().to_string(), val);
        }
        let id: String = entry.get("id").unwrap().to_string();
        map.insert(id, serde_json::to_value(entry).unwrap());
    }
    Ok(map)
}
